item.title: [Bloomberg] Financial Products for Hedging: Masters in Business with Jeff Chang
item.description: Barry speaks with Jeff Chang, President and Co-Founder of Vest. They discuss his journey into founding Vest. They also discuss Jeff's views on the benefits of hedging along with with the growth in popularity of ETFs. They also talk about the creation of financial products geared towards hedging. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: [Bloomberg] Iran Strikes: What’s at Stake for Oil Markets as Trump Attacks
item.description: President Donald Trump’s decision to strike Iran creates new risks for a significant chunk of the world’s oil supply.

item.title: [Bloomberg] The Evolution of Giorgia Meloni: Her Plan for Italy and Fears of AI
item.description: The prime minister stabilized Italy. In her second act, she wants growth — and a global reality check on AI.

item.title: [Bloomberg] James van Geelen on His Viral AI Doom Scenario
item.description: Making Sense of the 'Citrini Selloff.'

item.title: [Bloomberg] Odd Lots: James van Geelen on His AI Doom Scenario (Podcast)
item.description: Full article: https://www.bloomberg.com/news/audio/2026-02-28/odd-lots-james-van-geelen-on-his-ai-doom-scenario-podcast

item.title: [Bloomberg] Flood Re Set to ‘Layer Up’ on Cat Bonds Amid Hedge Fund Demand
item.description: Britain’s ultimate backstop against flood-related losses is planning to rely more on the capital markets, after its first ever catastrophe bond drew a lot of interest from specialist investors including hedge fund Fermat Capital Management.

item.title: [Bloomberg] Africa's Critical Minerals Moment | Bloomberg Next Africa
item.description: In this episode of Next Africa, we examine the intensifying global race for critical minerals and how the continent can turn surging demand into lasting economic gains. One country looking to seize the opportunity is Botswana. Long known for its diamonds, the nation is now pivoting toward a more diversified minerals future. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja speaks with Minerals and Energy Minister Bogolo Kenewendo on what comes next and how Botswana plans to capture more value from its resources. Plus, from cobalt and copper to cutting-edge artificial intelligence, we explore how mineral exploration is being reshaped and why KoBold Metals is launching the largest exploration campaign of any company operating in the Democratic Republic of Congo. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: [Bloomberg] Deutscher Rüstungsboom
item.description: Die Aufrüstung der Bundeswehr beflügelt die deutsche Wirtschaft mehr als viele erwartet hatten. Die Investitionen könnten möglicherweise sogar wichtiger sein als das Infrastrukturpaket. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: [Bloomberg] Lithium Producer SQM Sees Global Demand Growing 25% This Year
item.description: Top lithium producer SQM said it sees world demand for the battery metal growing about 25% this year, after reporting record quarterly sales volume as the industry emerges from a global glut.

item.title: [Bloomberg] Pakistan, Afghanistan Threaten War in Region Eyed by Superpowers
item.description: Pakistan and Afghanistan edged closer to all-out war this week, escalating tensions in a region where the world’s economic superpowers are vying for influence.

item.title: [FT] US and Israel launch ‘massive’ strikes on Iran as Trump calls for regime change
item.description: US president urges Iranians to ‘take over your government’

item.title: [FT] Trump gambles on war to force Iran’s capitulation
item.description: Bloody history of US interventions in region shows those launching assaults are rarely able to control outcome

item.title: [FT] A brief guide to Iran’s complex regime
item.description: Islamic Republic has survived countless crises and foreign interventions for almost half a century

item.title: [FT] Military briefing: What have the US and Israel hit and how can Iran respond?
item.description: American military assets in the region and Gulf oil supplies are vulnerable to retaliation and Israel is a renewed target

item.title: [FT] Pete Hegseth, Maga’s man at the Pentagon
item.description: Trump’s defence secretary is on the front lines of the culture wars — but can he lead the US in a battle against Iran?

item.title: [FT] Key areas of contention between Iran and the US
item.description: Washington has raised concerns about Tehran’s nuclear programme, ballistic missiles and allied militant groups

item.title: [FT] Anthropic to sue Trump administration after AI lab is labelled security risk
item.description: Pentagon bans start-up from government contracts, as OpenAI announces deal to deploy models in classified networks

item.title: [FT] DeepSeek to release long-awaited AI model in new challenge to US rivals
item.description: Chinese AI group has worked with Huawei to cut reliance on Nvidia chips

item.title: [FT] Project Warrior: How Paramount beat Netflix in $110bn battle for Warner
item.description: Ellison father and son viewed deal as a matter of survival to compete with tech giants that now dominate Hollywood

item.title: [FT] Collapse of UK property lender sends shockwaves through Wall Street
item.description: Lenders weigh losses linked to Market Financial Solutions, which financed a Bangladeshi politician’s real estate empire
